-(%0A%09%22bufio%22%0A%09%22fmt%22%0A%09%22os%22%0A%09%22strings%22%0A)%0A%0Afunc main() %7B%0A%09in := bufio.NewReader(os.Stdin)%0A%0A%09var t int%0A%09fmt.Fscan(in, &t)%0A%0A%09for i := 0; i %3C t; i++ %7B%0A%09%09var ultron, pessoa string%0A%0A%09%09fmt.Fscan(in, &ultron)%0A%09%09fmt.Fscan(in, &pessoa)%0A%0A%09%09ultron = strings.ToLower(ultron)%0A%09%09pessoa = strings.ToLower(pessoa)%0A%0A%09%09// Guarda as letras do c%C3%B3digo do Ultron%0A%09%09letras := make(map%5Brune%5Dbool)%0A%0A%09%09for _, c := range ultron %7B%0A%09%09%09letras%5Bc%5D = true%0A%09%09%7D%0A%0A%09%09// Conta quantas letras da pessoa pertencem ao c%C3%B3digo do Ultron%0A%09%09correspondencias := 0%0A%0A%09%09for _, c := range pessoa %7B%0A%09%09%09if letras%5Bc%5D %7B%0A%09%09%09%09correspondencias++%0A%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09%7D%0A%0A%09%09percentual := float64(correspondencias) / float64(len(pessoa))%0A%0A%09%09if percentual == 1.0 %7B%0A%09%09%09fmt.Println(%22chefe%22)%0A%09%09%7D else if percentual %3E 0.5 %7B%0A%09%09%09fmt.Println(%22ultron%22)%0A%09%09%7D else %7B%0A%09%09%09fmt.Println(%22pessoa%22)%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%7D
